title: German-Style Smoky Hash
description: A hearty German-inspired hash made with smoky flavors and crispy chickpeas.
instructions: 1. Heat 2 tablespoons of oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
2. Add the hash browns and cook until crispy, about 5 minutes.
3. In a separate pan, cook the chickpeas over medium heat until crispy, about 5 minutes.
4. Add the smoked paprika and charred onions to the pan with the chickpeas and stir to combine.
5. Add the garlic to the pan with the chickpeas and stir for 1 minute.
6. Stir in the parsley and cook for an additional 1 minute.
7. Serve the chickpea mixture on top of the hash browns.
